eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Dodge; Fillmore; Freeborn; Mower; Olmsted; Steele, MN; at 1:59 PM on AUG 29, 2019 Effective until 2:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the 2nd test of the Sheriff's Office in Mower County.  This is only a test.
